pairs.en: Hello, and welcome to the Q4 fiscal year '24 Snowflake earnings call. My name is Alex, I'll be coordinating the call today. [Operator instructions] I'll now hand you over to your host, Katherine McCracken, senior manager, investor relations. Please go ahead.
pairs.zh:
大家好，欢迎参加Snowflake 2024财年第四季度财报电话会议。我是Alex，今天由我主持本次会议。[操作员指示]现在将电话交给主持人——投资者关系高级经理Katherine McCracken。请开始。

原文：
Hello, and welcome to the Q4 fiscal year '24 Snowflake earnings call. My name is Alex, I'll be coordinating the call today. [Operator instructions] I'll now hand you over to your host, Katherine McCracken, senior manager, investor relations. Please go ahead.

pairs.en: Katherine McCracken--Senior Manager, Investor Relations
pairs.zh:
Katherine McCracken——投资者关系高级经理

Katherine McCracken--Senior Manager, Investor Relations

pairs.en: Good afternoon, and thank you for joining us on Snowflake's Q4 fiscal 2024 earnings call. With me in Bozeman, Montana are Sridhar Ramaswamy, our chief executive officer; Frank Slootman, our chairman; Mike Scarpelli, our chief financial officer; and Christian Kleinerman, our executive vice president of product, who will join us for the Q&A session. During today's call, we will review our financial results for the fourth quarter of fiscal 2024, and discuss our guidance for the first quarter and full year fiscal 2025. During today's call, we will make forward-looking statements, including statements related to our business operations and financial performance.
pairs.zh:
下午好，感谢大家参加Snowflake的2024财年第四季度财报电话会议。与我一起在蒙大拿州博兹曼的有首席执行官Sridhar Ramaswamy、董事长Frank Slootman、首席财务官Mike Scarpelli，以及产品执行副总裁Christian Kleinerman，他将参与问答环节。在今天电话会议中，我们将回顾2024财年第四季度的财务业绩，并讨论2025财年第一季度及全年的业绩指引。此外，我们还将发表前瞻性陈述，包括与业务运营和财务业绩相关的陈述。

Good afternoon, and thank you for joining us on Snowflake's Q4 fiscal 2024 earnings call. With me in Bozeman, Montana are Sridhar Ramaswamy, our chief executive officer; Frank Slootman, our chairman; Mike Scarpelli, our chief financial officer; and Christian Kleinerman, our executive vice president of product, who will join us for the Q&A session. During today's call, we will review our financial results for the fourth quarter of fiscal 2024, and discuss our guidance for the first quarter and full year fiscal 2025. During today's call, we will make forward-looking statements, including statements related to our business operations and financial performance.

pairs.en: These statements are subject to risks and uncertainties which could cause them to differ materially from actual results. Information concerning these risks and uncertainties is available in our earnings press release, our most recent Forms 10-K and 10-Q, and our other SEC reports. All our statements are made as of today, based on information currently available to us. Except as required by law, we assume no obligation to update any such statements.
pairs.zh:
这些陈述面临风险和不确定性，可能导致实际结果与陈述内容存在重大差异。有关这些风险和不确定性的信息可在我们的收益新闻稿、最新的10-K和10-Q表格以及向SEC提交的其他报告中获取。所有陈述均基于当前可用信息于今日作出。除非法律另有要求，我们不承担更新任何此类陈述的义务。

These statements are subject to risks and uncertainties which could cause them to differ materially from actual results. Information concerning these risks and uncertainties is available in our earnings press release, our most recent Forms 10-K and 10-Q, and our other SEC reports. All our statements are made as of today, based on information currently available to us. Except as required by law, we assume no obligation to update any such statements.

pairs.en: During today's call, we will also discuss certain non-GAAP financial measures, the reconciliation of GAAP to non-GAAP measures is included in today's earnings press release. The earnings press release and an accompanying investor presentation are available on our website at investors.snowflake.com. A replay of today's call will also be posted on the website. With that, I would now like to turn the call over to Frank.
pairs.zh:
在今天的电话会议中，我们还将讨论某些非GAAP财务指标，GAAP到非GAAP指标的调节包含在今天的收益新闻稿中。收益新闻稿及随附的投资者演示可在我们的网站investors.snowflake.com上获取。今天的电话会议重播也将发布在该网站上。至此，我现在想把电话交给Frank。

During today's call, we will also discuss certain non-GAAP financial measures, the reconciliation of GAAP to non-GAAP measures is included in today's earnings press release. The earnings press release and an accompanying investor presentation are available on our website at investors.snowflake.com. A replay of today's call will also be posted on the website. With that, I would now like to turn the call over to Frank.

pairs.en: Frank Slootman--Chairman
pairs.zh:
Frank Slootman--董事长

Frank Slootman--Chairman

pairs.en: Thanks, Katherine. Welcome, and good afternoon. Right now, you've heard the great news about Sridhar becoming our next CEO. Before we get to that, I would like to highlight our fiscal 2024 results.
pairs.zh:
谢谢，Katherine。欢迎各位，下午好。刚才大家听到了关于Sridhar成为我们下一任CEO的好消息。在讨论这件事之前，我想先强调一下我们2024财年的业绩。

Thanks, Katherine. Welcome, and good afternoon. Right now, you've heard the great news about Sridhar becoming our next CEO. Before we get to that, I would like to highlight our fiscal 2024 results.

pairs.en: FY '24 product revenue grew 38% year over year to reach $2.67 billion. Non-GAAP product gross margin expanded to 77.8%. Non-GAAP adjusted free cash flow was $810 million, representing 56% year-over-year growth. We continue to pair high growth with efficiency.
pairs.zh:
FY '24产品收入同比增长38%达到26.7亿美元。Non-GAAP产品毛利率扩大至77.8%。Non-GAAP调整后自由现金流为8.1亿美元，同比增长56%。我们继续将高增长与效率相结合。

FY '24 product revenue grew 38% year over year to reach $2.67 billion. Non-GAAP product gross margin expanded to 77.8%. Non-GAAP adjusted free cash flow was $810 million, representing 56% year-over-year growth. We continue to pair high growth with efficiency.

pairs.en: The year began against an unsettled macroeconomic backdrop. We witnessed lackluster sentiment and customer hesitation due to lack of visibility in their businesses. Customers prefer to wait-and-see posture versus leaning into longer-term contract expansions. This reversed in the second half of the year and we started seeing larger multiyear commitments.
pairs.zh:
今年初宏观经济背景动荡不安。我们观察到市场情绪低迷，客户因业务前景不明而犹豫不决。客户更倾向于采取观望态度，而非签订长期合同扩张。这一趋势在下半年发生逆转，我们开始看到更大规模的多年期承诺。

The year began against an unsettled macroeconomic backdrop. We witnessed lackluster sentiment and customer hesitation due to lack of visibility in their businesses. Customers prefer to wait-and-see posture versus leaning into longer-term contract expansions. This reversed in the second half of the year and we started seeing larger multiyear commitments.

pairs.en: Q4 was an exceptionally strong bookings quarter. We reported $5.2 billion of remaining performance obligations, representing accelerated year-on-year growth of 41%. Our international theaters outperformed the company as a whole. We continue to see success in our effort to campaign the largest enterprises globally.
pairs.zh:
Q4是一个异常强劲的预订季度。我们报告了52亿美元的剩余履约义务，同比增长加速至41%。我们的国际业务板块表现优于公司整体。在争取全球最大企业的努力中，我们继续取得成功。

Q4 was an exceptionally strong bookings quarter. We reported $5.2 billion of remaining performance obligations, representing accelerated year-on-year growth of 41%. Our international theaters outperformed the company as a whole. We continue to see success in our effort to campaign the largest enterprises globally.

pairs.en: We added 14 Global 2000s in the quarter, and eight of our top 10 customers grew sequentially. Meanwhile, Snowflake has announced many new technologies that let customers mobilize AI, Streamlit in Snowflake, Snowpark ML Modeling API, and Cortex ML functions are all generally available. we also received FedRAMP High authorization on the AWS GovCloud. This enables Snowflake to protect some of the federal government's most sensitive and classified data.
pairs.zh:
本季度我们新增了14家Global 2000企业，前十大客户中有八家实现环比增长。与此同时，Snowflake发布了多项新技术，让客户能够运用AI——包括Streamlit in Snowflake、Snowpark ML Modeling API及Cortex ML函数现已全面上市。我们还获得了AWS GovCloud上的FedRAMP High授权，这使得Snowflake能够保护美国联邦政府最敏感和机密的资料。

原文：
We added 14 Global 2000s in the quarter, and eight of our top 10 customers grew sequentially. Meanwhile, Snowflake has announced many new technologies that let customers mobilize AI, Streamlit in Snowflake, Snowpark ML Modeling API, and Cortex ML functions are all generally available. we also received FedRAMP High authorization on the AWS GovCloud. This enables Snowflake to protect some of the federal government's most sensitive and classified data.

pairs.en: Now, on the topic of CEO transition. I was brought to Snowflake five years ago to help the company break out and scale. I wanted to grow the business fast, but not at all costs. It had to be efficient and establish a foundation for long-term growth.
pairs.zh:
现在，关于CEO交接的话题。五年前我被引入Snowflake，以帮助公司实现突破和规模化。我希望快速拓展业务，但并非不计代价。必须高效，并为长期增长奠定基础。

Now, on the topic of CEO transition. I was brought to Snowflake five years ago to help the company break out and scale. I wanted to grow the business fast, but not at all costs. It had to be efficient and establish a foundation for long-term growth.

pairs.en: I believe the company succeeded in that mission. The board has run a succession process that wasn't based on arbitrary timeline, but instead, looked for an opportunity to advance the company's mission, well into the future. The arrival of Sridhar Ramaswamy through the acquisition of Neeva last year represented that opportunity. Since joining us, Sridhar has been leading Snowflake's AI strategies, bringing new products and features to market at an incredible pace.
pairs.zh:
我相信公司成功完成了这一使命。董事会进行的继任流程并非基于任意的时间表，而是着眼于寻找一个能推动公司使命长远发展的机会。去年通过收购Neeva，Sridhar Ramaswamy的加入正是那个机会。自加入以来，Sridhar一直领导着Snowflake的人工智能战略，以惊人的速度将新产品和新功能推向市场。

I believe the company succeeded in that mission. The board has run a succession process that wasn't based on arbitrary timeline, but instead, looked for an opportunity to advance the company's mission, well into the future. The arrival of Sridhar Ramaswamy through the acquisition of Neeva last year represented that opportunity. Since joining us, Sridhar has been leading Snowflake's AI strategies, bringing new products and features to market at an incredible pace.

pairs.en: He led the launch of Snowflake's Cortex, Snowflake's new fully managed service that makes AI simple and secure. Prior to Neeva, Sridhar led all of Google's advertising products. During his 15-year tenure at Google, he helped grow AdWords and Google's advertising business from $1.5 billion to over $100 billion. With the onslaught of generative AI, Snowflake needs a hard-driving technologist to navigate the challenges the new world represents.
pairs.zh:
他领导推出了Snowflake的Cortex——Snowflake全新完全托管服务，让AI变得简单安全。在加入Neeva之前，Sridhar负责管理Google的所有广告产品。在Google任职的15年间，他帮助AdWords及Google广告业务从15亿美元增长至超过1000亿美元。随着生成式AI的冲击，Snowflake需要一位富有冲劲的技术专家来应对新时代带来的挑战。

He led the launch of Snowflake's Cortex, Snowflake's new fully managed service that makes AI simple and secure. Prior to Neeva, Sridhar led all of Google's advertising products. During his 15-year tenure at Google, he helped grow AdWords and Google's advertising business from $1.5 billion to over $100 billion. With the onslaught of generative AI, Snowflake needs a hard-driving technologist to navigate the challenges the new world represents.

pairs.en: Sridhar's vision for the future and his proven ability to execute at scale made it clear to us as a board, that he is the right executive at the right time to lead Snowflake. This marks my retirement from an operating role. I will remain on duty as chairman of the board, and look forward to working with Sridhar and the team going forward. With that, I will pass it over to Sridhar.
pairs.zh:
Sridhar对未来的愿景以及他在大规模执行方面已经证明的能力，让我们董事会清楚地认识到，他是在正确时间领导Snowflake的合适高管。这标志着我从运营角色退休。我将继续担任董事会主席，并期待与Sridhar及团队一起前进。就此，我将把发言权交给Sridhar。

原文：
Sridhar's vision for the future and his proven ability to execute at scale made it clear to us as a board, that he is the right executive at the right time to lead Snowflake. This marks my retirement from an operating role. I will remain on duty as chairman of the board, and look forward to working with Sridhar and the team going forward. With that, I will pass it over to Sridhar.

pairs.en: Sridhar Ramaswamy--Chief Executive Officer
pairs.zh:
Sridhar Ramaswamy——首席执行官

Sridhar Ramaswamy--Chief Executive Officer

pairs.en: Thank you, Frank. I'm honored to have been chosen to lead this great company. The success that Snowflake has achieved is a testament to the great customers, employees, and partners who have contributed along the way. And of course, Frank has been a huge part of getting us here, which I gratefully acknowledge.
pairs.zh:
谢谢你，Frank。我很荣幸被选中领导这家伟大的公司。Snowflake取得的成功，离不开一路以来贡献良多的优秀客户、员工和合作伙伴。当然，Frank在我们走到今天的过程中功不可没，我对此深表感激。

Thank you, Frank. I'm honored to have been chosen to lead this great company. The success that Snowflake has achieved is a testament to the great customers, employees, and partners who have contributed along the way. And of course, Frank has been a huge part of getting us here, which I gratefully acknowledge.

pairs.en: Snowflake is a once-in-a-generation company that will revolutionize the world with its cloud data platform. This has become more true in the past year with the rapid technology innovations we have seen. Generative AI is at the forefront of my customer conversations. This drives renewed emphasis on data strategy in preparation for these new technologies.
pairs.zh:
Snowflake 是一家世代仅有一次的公司，将凭借其云数据平台彻底改变世界。过去一年里，随着我们见证的快速技术创新，这一点愈发真实。生成式AI（Generative AI）是我与客户交流的核心话题。这促使人们重新重视数据战略，为这些新技术做好准备。

Snowflake is a once-in-a-generation company that will revolutionize the world with its cloud data platform. This has become more true in the past year with the rapid technology innovations we have seen. Generative AI is at the forefront of my customer conversations. This drives renewed emphasis on data strategy in preparation for these new technologies.

pairs.en: You heard the team say many times, "There's no AI strategy without a data strategy." And this has opened a massive opportunity for Snowflake to address. To deliver on the opportunity ahead, we must have clear focus and move even faster to bring innovation on the Snowflake platform to our customers and partners. This will be my focus. I look forward to working with the team, and I'm extremely excited for the opportunity.
pairs.zh:
你们多次听到团队说：“没有数据战略，就没有AI战略。”这为Snowflake带来了巨大的机遇。为了抓住未来的机遇，我们必须明确重点，并以更快的速度将Snowflake平台上的创新带给我们的客户和合作伙伴。这将是我工作的重心。我期待与团队合作，并对这一机遇感到无比兴奋。

原文：
You heard the team say many times, "There's no AI strategy without a data strategy." And this has opened a massive opportunity for Snowflake to address. To deliver on the opportunity ahead, we must have clear focus and move even faster to bring innovation on the Snowflake platform to our customers and partners. This will be my focus. I look forward to working with the team, and I'm extremely excited for the opportunity.

pairs.en: With that, I'll pass it over to Mike.
pairs.zh:
那么，我把发言权交给Mike。

With that, I'll pass it over to Mike.

pairs.en: Mike Scarpelli--Chief Financial Officer
pairs.zh:
Mike Scarpelli——首席财务官  
Mike Scarpelli--Chief Financial Officer

pairs.en: Thank you, Sridhar. Q4 marked a strong finish to a challenging year. Product revenue was $738 million, growing 33% year-over-year. Similar to prior years, we experienced significant holiday impacts in December and January.
pairs.zh:
谢谢你，Sridhar。Q4为充满挑战的一年画上了圆满的句号。产品收入为$738 million，同比增长33%。与往年类似，我们在12月和1月经历了显著的节日影响。

Thank you, Sridhar. Q4 marked a strong finish to a challenging year. Product revenue was $738 million, growing 33% year-over-year. Similar to prior years, we experienced significant holiday impacts in December and January.

pairs.en: Holidays make it difficult to discern meaningful consumption trends. In the quarter, younger customers led revenue growth. These accounts are adding new workloads in migrating from legacy vendors. Financial Services and retail were our largest revenue contributors, and we are seeing emerging momentum from the EMEA region and technology vertical.
pairs.zh:
节假日使得难以辨别有意义的消费趋势。本季度，年轻客户引领了收入增长。这些账户在从传统供应商迁移的过程中增加了新的工作负载。金融服务和零售是我们最大的收入来源，同时我们看到来自EMEA区域和技术垂直行业的新兴势头。

Holidays make it difficult to discern meaningful consumption trends. In the quarter, younger customers led revenue growth. These accounts are adding new workloads in migrating from legacy vendors. Financial Services and retail were our largest revenue contributors, and we are seeing emerging momentum from the EMEA region and technology vertical.

pairs.en: Customer optimizations returned to a normal level, with eight of our top 10 accounts growing sequentially. We proactively engaged with customers to help them optimize their Snowflake usage and we'll continue to do so. History has shown that optimizations expand our long-term opportunity. We now have 83 customers with trailing 12-month product revenue greater than $5 million, up from $75 million in Q3.
pairs.zh:
客户优化回归正常水平，我们的前十大客户中有八个实现了环比增长。我们主动与客户互动，帮助他们优化Snowflake的使用，并将继续这样做。历史表明，优化拓展了我们的长期机会。目前，我们有83个客户的过去12个月产品收入超过500万美元，高于第三季度的7500万美元。

Customer optimizations returned to a normal level, with eight of our top 10 accounts growing sequentially. We proactively engaged with customers to help them optimize their Snowflake usage and we'll continue to do so. History has shown that optimizations expand our long-term opportunity. We now have 83 customers with trailing 12-month product revenue greater than $5 million, up from $75 million in Q3.

pairs.en: Q4 was an exceptional booking quarter for us. Bookings are not a leading indicator of revenue; they do signal an improving macro environment. Remaining performance obligations grew 41% year over year to $5.2 billion. Of the $5.2 billion in RPO, we expect approximately 50% to be recognized as revenue in the next 12 months.
pairs.zh:
第四季度对我们来说是一个极佳的预订季度。预订量并非收入的领先指标，但它们确实表明宏观环境正在改善。剩余履约义务同比增长41%，达到52亿美元。在这52亿美元的RPO中，我们预计约50%将在未来12个月内确认为收入。

原文：Q4 was an exceptional booking quarter for us. Bookings are not a leading indicator of revenue; they do signal an improving macro environment. Remaining performance obligations grew 41% year over year to $5.2 billion. Of the $5.2 billion in RPO, we expect approximately 50% to be recognized as revenue in the next 12 months.

pairs.en: We signed our largest deal ever in Q4, a five-year, $250 million contract with an existing customer. Our international territories returned to meaningful growth, outperforming expectations for the first time in a year. We made significant progress in delivering margin expansion. Non-GAAP product margin at 78% was up approximately 300 basis points year over year, improved terms from the cloud service providers have contributed to margin expansion.
pairs.zh:
我们在第四季度签署了有史以来最大的一笔交易，与一位现有客户签订了为期五年、价值2.5亿美元的合同。我们的国际地区恢复了有意义的增长，一年来首次超出预期。我们在实现利润率扩张方面取得了显著进展。Non-GAAP产品毛利率为78%，同比上升约300个基点，云服务提供商提供的更优惠条款为利润率扩张做出了贡献。

原文：
We signed our largest deal ever in Q4, a five-year, $250 million contract with an existing customer. Our international territories returned to meaningful growth, outperforming expectations for the first time in a year. We made significant progress in delivering margin expansion. Non-GAAP product margin at 78% was up approximately 300 basis points year over year, improved terms from the cloud service providers have contributed to margin expansion.

pairs.en: Non-GAAP operating margin of 9% was ahead of expectations. Operating margin benefited from increased hiring scrutiny. Non-GAAP adjusted free cash flow margin was 42%. Bookings outperformance increased collections.
pairs.zh:
非GAAP营业利润率为9%，超出预期。营业利润率受益于招聘审查的加强。非GAAP调整后自由现金流利润率为42%。预订订单的优异表现增加了收款。

原文：
Non-GAAP operating margin of 9% was ahead of expectations. Operating margin benefited from increased hiring scrutiny. Non-GAAP adjusted free cash flow margin was 42%. Bookings outperformance increased collections.

pairs.en: We ended the quarter with $4.8 billion in cash, cash equivalents, and short-term and long-term investments. We did not repurchase any shares in Q4. We have approximately $1.4 billion remaining under our original authorization of $2 billion. Now, let's turn to outlook.
pairs.zh:
本季度结束时，我们持有48亿美元现金、现金等价物以及短期和长期投资。第四季度我们没有回购任何股票。在最初授权的20亿美元中，我们还剩约14亿美元。现在，让我们转向展望。

We ended the quarter with $4.8 billion in cash, cash equivalents, and short-term and long-term investments. We did not repurchase any shares in Q4. We have approximately $1.4 billion remaining under our original authorization of $2 billion. Now, let's turn to outlook.

pairs.en: Consumption trends have improved since the beginning of last year, but have not returned to pre-FY '24 patterns. We have evolved our forecasting process to be more receptive to recent trends. For that reason, our guidance assumes similar customer behavior to fiscal 2024. We are forecasting increased revenue headwinds associated with product efficiency gains, tiered storage pricing, and the expectation that some of our customers will leverage Iceberg tables for their storage.
pairs.zh:
自去年初以来，消费趋势有所改善，但尚未恢复到24财年之前的模式。我们改进了预测流程，以更好地反映近期趋势。因此，我们的指引假设客户行为与2024财年相似。我们预计，与产品效率提升、分层存储定价以及部分客户将使用Iceberg tables进行存储相关的收入阻力将会增加。

Consumption trends have improved since the beginning of last year, but have not returned to pre-FY '24 patterns. We have evolved our forecasting process to be more receptive to recent trends. For that reason, our guidance assumes similar customer behavior to fiscal 2024. We are forecasting increased revenue headwinds associated with product efficiency gains, tiered storage pricing, and the expectation that some of our customers will leverage Iceberg tables for their storage.

pairs.en: We are not including potential revenue benefits from these initiatives in our forecast. These changes in our assumption impact our long-term guidance. Internally, we continue to march toward $10 billion in product revenue. Externally, we will not manage expectations of our previous targets until we have more data.

We are focused on executing in FY '24 to ensure long-term durable growth. Now, turning to FY '25 guidance. For the first quarter, we expect product revenue between $745 million and $750 million, representing year-over-year growth between 26% and 27%. For the first quarter, we expect non-GAAP operating margin of 3%, and 366 million diluted weighted-average shares outstanding.
pairs.zh:
我们专注于在FY '24执行，以确保长期持久增长。现在，转向FY '25指引。对于第一季度，我们预计产品收入在7.45亿美元至7.50亿美元之间，同比增长26%至27%。对于第一季度，我们预计非GAAP营业利润率为3%，稀释加权平均流通股数为3.66亿股。

We are focused on executing in FY '24 to ensure long-term durable growth. Now, turning to FY '25 guidance. For the first quarter, we expect product revenue between $745 million and $750 million, representing year-over-year growth between 26% and 27%. For the first quarter, we expect non-GAAP operating margin of 3%, and 366 million diluted weighted-average shares outstanding.

pairs.en: For the full year, we expect product revenue of approximately $3.25 billion, representing 22% year-over-year growth. We expect Snowpark to contribute 3% of product revenue. We are not including any other new products in our forecast at this time. For the full year, we expect non-GAAP product gross margin of 76%, non-GAAP operating margin of 6%, non-GAAP adjusted free cash flow margin of 29%, and diluted weighted average shares outstanding of 368 million.
pairs.zh:
全年我们预计产品收入约为32.5亿美元，同比增长22%。我们预计Snowpark将贡献产品收入的3%。我们目前未将任何其他新产品纳入预测。全年我们预计非GAAP产品毛利率为76%，非GAAP营业利润率为6%，非GAAP调整后自由现金流利润率为29%，稀释加权平均流通股数为3.68亿股。

For the full year, we expect product revenue of approximately $3.25 billion, representing 22% year-over-year growth. We expect Snowpark to contribute 3% of product revenue. We are not including any other new products in our forecast at this time. For the full year, we expect non-GAAP product gross margin of 76%, non-GAAP operating margin of 6%, non-GAAP adjusted free cash flow margin of 29%, and diluted weighted average shares outstanding of 368 million.

pairs.en: We plan to add approximately 1,000 employees this year inclusive of M&A. For expenses, our forecast assumes meaningful investments in our AI initiatives. We expect approximately $50 million of GPU-related costs in fiscal year '25, approximately $10 million flowing through cost of product revenue. For the purpose of forecasting, we're not including any incremental revenue associated with these features.
pairs.zh:
我们计划今年通过并购增加约1,000名员工。在费用方面，我们的预测假设对AI项目进行重大投资。预计2025财年GPU相关成本约为5000万美元，其中约1000万美元计入产品收入成本。为便于预测，我们未将与此功能相关的任何增量收入计算在内。

We plan to add approximately 1,000 employees this year inclusive of M&A. For expenses, our forecast assumes meaningful investments in our AI initiatives. We expect approximately $50 million of GPU-related costs in fiscal year '25, approximately $10 million flowing through cost of product revenue. For the purpose of forecasting, we're not including any incremental revenue associated with these features.

pairs.en: We've also evolved our go-to-market motion. As we compensate more reps on a consumption quota, we will see increased commission expense. Consumption-based commissions are expensed immediately rather than amortized over a five-year period. This has no impact on cash flows but is expected to have approximately $30 million impact on P&L.
pairs.zh:
我们也改进了我们的市场推广策略。随着我们根据消费配额来补偿更多的销售代表，佣金费用将会增加。基于消费的佣金会立即费用化，而不是在五年内摊销。这对现金流没有影响，但预计会对损益表造成大约$30 million的影响。

We've also evolved our go-to-market motion. As we compensate more reps on a consumption quota, we will see increased commission expense. Consumption-based commissions are expensed immediately rather than amortized over a five-year period. This has no impact on cash flows but is expected to have approximately $30 million impact on P&L.

pairs.en: Lastly, I would like to acknowledge Frank's retirement. Working with Frank for the past 17 years has been an incredible learning experience and I'm grateful for our time together. Frank's contributions to Snowflake have set the company up for long-term success and I look forward to being part of that journey. I have committed to Sridhar and the Board that I will be with Snowflake for at least the next three years.
pairs.zh:
最后，我想对Frank的退休表示敬意。过去17年与Frank共事是一段非常宝贵的学习经历，我感激我们共度的时光。Frank对Snowflake的贡献为公司奠定了长期成功的基础，我期待成为这段旅程的一部分。我已向Sridhar和董事会承诺，至少未来三年我会继续留在Snowflake。

Lastly, I would like to acknowledge Frank's retirement. Working with Frank for the past 17 years has been an incredible learning experience and I'm grateful for our time together. Frank's contributions to Snowflake have set the company up for long-term success and I look forward to being part of that journey. I have committed to Sridhar and the Board that I will be with Snowflake for at least the next three years.

pairs.en: Before closing, we will host our Investor Day on June 4th in San Francisco in conjunction with Data Cloud Summit, our annual user conference. If you're interested in attending, please email iratsnowflake.com. With that, operator, you can now open up the line for questions.

pairs.en: But on the surface, it looks like you're guiding with a lot more conservatism than a year ago. So, I'm just wondering, does that part of this feel a little more comfortable to you, or do you think it could take a little longer to convert bookings to consumption this year?

pairs.en: I think we are definitely being more conservative this year given the consumption patterns we saw in '24. And as we said at our Analyst Day last year, we needed to see consumption patterns more in line with what we saw pre-'24 to get to our longer-term goal. And as a result, we've decided to forecast this year based upon the consumption patterns we saw in '24. And as you know, we forecast based upon historical consumption of our products.
pairs.zh:
我认为，考虑到我们在'24年观察到的消费模式，今年我们肯定会更加保守。正如我们在去年的分析师日上所说，我们需要看到消费模式更符合我们在'24年之前观察到的情况，才能实现我们的长期目标。因此，我们决定根据在'24年观察到的消费模式来预测今年。如你所知，我们基于产品的历史消费数据进行预测。

I think we are definitely being more conservative this year given the consumption patterns we saw in '24. pairs.en: There's a lot of new products coming into GA and public preview this year that we have not taken into account in our forecast, and we will do so once we start to see that consumption. And so, we will take this quarter by quarter for the year.

pairs.en: Thank you. Frank, all the best from me as well. A question for Sridhar. If you think about the customer conversations with AI and people will think differently about the data and the data platform.

pairs.en: Can you speak a little bit about how do you see that playing out for you guys from a Snowflake perspective in terms of -- the one part that you have like the data warehouse, but also then more on the lake side? Like, what do you see, and what are you hearing in customer conversations, and how you're positioned now, and what would be the push for you there? And then, I have one follow-up for Mike.
pairs.zh:
你能谈谈从Snowflake的角度来看，你们在这方面会如何发展吗？比如你们既有数据仓库这一块，也有更多偏向湖端的部分。你看到了什么？在客户对话中听到了什么？你们现在是如何定位的？你们在这一领域会有什么推进？另外，我还有一个后续问题想问Mike。

Can you speak a little bit about how do you see that playing out for you guys from a Snowflake perspective in terms of -- the one part that you have like the data warehouse, but also then more on the lake side? Like, what do you see, and what are you hearing in customer conversations, and how you're positioned now, and what would be the push for you there? And then, I have one follow-up for Mike.

pairs.en: Sridhar Ramaswamy--Chief Executive Officer
pairs.zh:
Sridhar Ramaswamy——首席执行官

Sridhar Ramaswamy--Chief Executive Officer

pairs.en: Yeah. On Snowflake Cortex, we are implementing it as a core platform layer. It ships with every deployment and it makes AI readily accessible from SQL, so that even an analyst that's not an LLM expert or a Python expert can simply write SQL for things like summarization or sentiment detection data that is already in Snowflake. Our overall aspiration here is to make AI really, really simple for our customers to use.
pairs.zh:
是的。在Snowflake Cortex中，我们将其作为一个核心平台层来实施。它随每次部署一起提供，使得AI可以通过SQL轻松访问，这样即便是非LLM专家或Python专家的分析师，也能简单地通过SQL对Snowflake中的数据进行摘要或情感检测等操作。我们整体的愿景是让客户使用AI变得极其简单。

原文：
Yeah. On Snowflake Cortex, we are implementing it as a core platform layer. It ships with every deployment and it makes AI readily accessible from SQL, so that even an analyst that's not an LLM expert or a Python expert can simply write SQL for things like summarization or sentiment detection data that is already in Snowflake. Our overall aspiration here is to make AI really, really simple for our customers to use.

pairs.en: And in some sense, the prototypical AI application is a chatbot over a specialized corpus using what's called a RAG, retrieval augmented generation. But the idea is basically you're able to, say, talk to your documentation or talk to the support cases that you have, and get answers back in natural language, but with things like citations, so you can actually believe the answers that are coming back from the chatbot. So, both of these are ready-made applications that our customers are excited about. But I would say the big, big unlock is being able to get at the structured data that is in Snowflake and have that be accessed by many, many more people.
pairs.zh:
在某种程度上，典型的AI应用是基于特定语料库的聊天机器人，采用所谓的RAG（检索增强生成）。但基本思路是，你能够与你的文档或支持案例进行对话，并以自然语言形式获得回答，同时附上引用来源，这样你就能真正信赖聊天机器人给出的答案。因此，这两类都是现成的应用，我们的客户对此非常期待。不过，我认为最大的突破在于能够访问Snowflake中的结构化数据，并让更多人可以获取这些数据。

原文：
And in some sense, the prototypical AI application is a chatbot over a specialized corpus using what's called a RAG, retrieval augmented generation. But the idea is basically you're able to, say, talk to your documentation or talk to the support cases that you have, and get answers back in natural language, but with things like citations, so you can actually believe the answers that are coming back from the chatbot. So, both of these are ready-made applications that our customers are excited about. But I would say the big, big unlock is being able to get at the structured data that is in Snowflake and have that be accessed by many, many more people.

pairs.en: Today, people go through an elaborate process of getting the data ready, using BI tool, going through a pretty slow cycle. And so, the things that we're driving toward is creating easy ways for people to be able to talk to subsets of data, like Mike to be able to talk to finance data, or other things like that. I would say that that is the thing that is truly, truly exciting for our customers. And with respect to where data is sitting, as you know, we support things like Iceberg formats.
pairs.zh:
如今，人们需要经历一个复杂的过程来准备数据，使用BI工具，经历一个相当缓慢的周期。因此，我们正在努力的方向是创造简单的方法，让人们能够与数据子集进行交互，比如Mike能够与财务数据对话，或者类似的其他事情。我想说，这对我们的客户来说，才是真正令人兴奋的事情。至于数据存储的位置，如你所知，我们支持像Iceberg格式这样的技术。

Today, people go through an elaborate process of getting the data ready, using BI tool, going through a pretty slow cycle. And so, the things that we're driving toward is creating easy ways for people to be able to talk to subsets of data, like Mike to be able to talk to finance data, or other things like that. I would say that that is the thing that is truly, truly exciting for our customers. And with respect to where data is sitting, as you know, we support things like Iceberg formats.

pairs.en: It is getting more and more popular. So, data interoperability is very much a thing and our AI products can generally act on data that is sitting in cloud storage as well. So, the solutions that we're offering as part of Snowflake are broadly applicable both to data within Snowflake, but also to data that's sitting in cloud storage.
pairs.zh:
它正变得越来越流行。因此，数据互通性非常重要，我们的人工智能产品通常也能处理存储在云存储中的数据。所以，作为Snowflake一部分提供的解决方案，既广泛适用于Snowflake内部的数据，也适用于存储在云存储中的数据。

It is getting more and more popular. So, data interoperability is very much a thing and our AI products can generally act on data that is sitting in cloud storage as well. So, the solutions that we're offering as part of Snowflake are broadly applicable both to data within Snowflake, but also to data that's sitting in cloud storage.

pairs.en: It's about a 6.2%, 6.3% impact this year. But coupled with that too in the revenue, we rolled out in Q4 tiered storage pricing. So, the amount of revenue associated with storage is coming down. But on top of that, we do expect a number of our large customers are going to adopt Iceberg formats and move their data out of Snowflake where we lose that storage revenue and also the compute revenue associated with moving that data into Snowflake.
pairs.zh:
今年影响大约为6.2%、6.3%。但与此同时，在收入方面，我们在Q4推出了分层存储定价。因此，与存储相关的收入正在下降。但除此之外，我们预计许多大客户将采用Iceberg格式，并将数据移出Snowflake，这样我们不仅会失去存储收入，还会失去与将数据移入Snowflake相关的计算收入。

原文：
It's about a 6.2%, 6.3% impact this year. But coupled with that too in the revenue, we rolled out in Q4 tiered storage pricing. So, the amount of revenue associated with storage is coming down. But on top of that, we do expect a number of our large customers are going to adopt Iceberg formats and move their data out of Snowflake where we lose that storage revenue and also the compute revenue associated with moving that data into Snowflake.

pairs.en: We do expect, though, there'll be more workloads that will move to us, but until we see that incremental revenue on workloads, we're not going to forecast that. I will say last year, we saw a 62% increase in the number of jobs running on Snowflake year over year with a corresponding 33% increase in revenue. And that's because we continue to show our customers that we become cheaper and cheaper to them every year. And when we do that, it opens up new workload opportunities for us, and we'll continue to do that.
pairs.zh:
我们确实预期会有更多工作负载迁移到我们这里，但在看到这些工作负载带来的增量收入之前，我们不会对此进行预测。我要说的是，去年，运行在Snowflake上的任务数量同比增长了62%，相应的收入增长了33%。这是因为我们持续向客户证明，我们每年都变得越来越便宜。当我们做到这一点时，就为我们打开了新的工作负载机会，我们将继续这样做。

We do expect, though, there'll be more workloads that will move to us, but until we see that incremental revenue on workloads, we're not going to forecast that. I will say last year, we saw a 62% increase in the number of jobs running on Snowflake year over year with a corresponding 33% increase in revenue. And that's because we continue to show our customers that we become cheaper and cheaper to them every year. And when we do that, it opens up new workload opportunities for us, and we'll continue to do that.

pairs.en: Sridhar Ramaswamy--Chief Executive Officer
pairs.zh:
Sridhar Ramaswamy——首席执行官

Sridhar Ramaswamy--Chief Executive Officer

pairs.en: Yeah. When it comes to AI, as I was outlining, first of all, simplifying it so that it is easy for our customers to use via Cortex is the very first thing. And a lot of things that you and I, like analysts do with text now becomes so much easier to do with language models of different sizes. But I would say the applications that truly drive customer excitement that there is incredible demand for are on the Document AI side and on the Copilot offering.
pairs.zh:
是的，正如我概述的，在AI方面，首先要通过Cortex简化它，使其便于客户使用。像你和我这样的分析师处理文本的许多事情，现在通过不同规模的语言模型变得容易得多。但我要说，真正让客户兴奋且需求极大的应用是Document AI和Copilot产品方面。

原文：
Yeah. When it comes to AI, as I was outlining, first of all, simplifying it so that it is easy for our customers to use via Cortex is the very first thing. And a lot of things that you and I, like analysts do with text now becomes so much easier to do with language models of different sizes. But I would say the applications that truly drive customer excitement that there is incredible demand for are on the Document AI side and on the Copilot offering.

pairs.en: They're different, but they use the same underlying technologies. Document AI is about extracting structured information from unstructured documents like PDFs that every enterprise has boatloads of. And then, on the other side, Copilot finally makes real the possibility of like being able to just talk to your data, ask questions in natural language and for that to get translated underneath for that SQL to be run against Snowflake and for you to get back a tabular answer and then soon visualizations as well. It's that kind of fluid access that customers are really, really excited by.
pairs.zh:
它们有所不同，但底层技术相同。Document AI 是从非结构化文档（如每个企业都拥有的大量 PDF）中提取结构化信息的技术。而另一方面，Copilot 终于实现了这样的可能：直接与数据对话，用自然语言提问，然后在底层将其转化为 SQL 查询并在 Snowflake 上执行，再以表格形式返回答案，不久后还能返回可视化结果。这种流畅的数据访问方式正是客户们感到无比兴奋的。

They're different, but they use the same underlying technologies. Document AI is about extracting structured information from unstructured documents like PDFs that every enterprise has boatloads of. And then, on the other side, Copilot finally makes real the possibility of like being able to just talk to your data, ask questions in natural language and for that to get translated underneath for that SQL to be run against Snowflake and for you to get back a tabular answer and then soon visualizations as well. It's that kind of fluid access that customers are really, really excited by.

pairs.en: And what you get from Snowflake is that this comes out of the box. This is very easy. You can build a Streamlit app with it. And so, it avoids all of the complicated exfiltration of data using other tools, needing to stitch things together as an IT project in order to get something done.
pairs.zh:
从Snowflake你得到的是，它开箱即用。这非常简单。你可以用它构建一个Streamlit应用。因此，它避免了使用其他工具进行复杂的数据外泄，需要像IT项目一样将各种东西拼凑起来才能完成任务。

And what you get from Snowflake is that this comes out of the box. This is very easy. You can build a Streamlit app with it. And so, it avoids all of the complicated exfiltration of data using other tools, needing to stitch things together as an IT project in order to get something done.

pairs.en: And that's the power of our platform where we know the data. We know the schema. We know all the previous queries that have been run against it and are, therefore, able to create a very effective Copilot solution. So hopefully, that gives you a flavor for the kinds of conversations that we've been having with customers and what they're looking forward.
pairs.zh:
这就是我们平台的优势所在：我们了解数据，了解数据结构，了解所有此前针对数据运行的查询，因此能够构建一个非常高效的Copilot解决方案。希望这些能让您感受到我们与客户交流的内容以及他们对未来的期待。

And that's the power of our platform where we know the data. We know the schema. We know all the previous queries that have been run against it and are, therefore, able to create a very effective Copilot solution. So hopefully, that gives you a flavor for the kinds of conversations that we've been having with customers and what they're looking forward.

pairs.en: Sridhar Ramaswamy--Chief Executive Officer
pairs.zh:
Sridhar Ramaswamy——首席执行官

Sridhar Ramaswamy--Chief Executive Officer

pairs.en: Yeah. And to answer your question, Kash, as you know, like Frank, our Founders have built Snowflake to be the trusted efficient, and cost-effective platform for enterprises. So, I'm standing on the shoulder of giants to take us to the next chapter. And we already have a pretty ambitious plan, for example, to be able to write applications on top of Snowflake on those underlying technologies, native applications, container services or rolling out to GA this year.

And then, I would add what is unique about this moment in technology, of course, is AI and its power to democratize access to enterprise data. I think this dramatically changes our understanding and notions of what an application is, all things can be stitched together. I think it is that a data platform, combined with applications, with AI powering things like interoperability, that I think is the biggest opportunity in front of us. And we have a ton of investments, as I said, many of them are coming to GA.
pairs.zh:
此外，我还想补充一点，当前技术时代的独特之处在于AI及其对企业数据访问民主化的推动力。我认为这极大地改变了我们对应用程序是什么的理解和概念，所有事物都可以被整合在一起。在我看来，一个数据平台，结合应用程序，并以AI驱动互操作性等能力，正是我们面前最大的机遇。正如我所说，我们进行了大量投资，其中许多项目即将进入GA阶段。

原文：
And then, I would add what is unique about this moment in technology, of course, is AI and its power to democratize access to enterprise data. I think this dramatically changes our understanding and notions of what an application is, all things can be stitched together. I think it is that a data platform, combined with applications, with AI powering things like interoperability, that I think is the biggest opportunity in front of us. And we have a ton of investments, as I said, many of them are coming to GA.

pairs.en: Getting them out quickly and driving adoption is easily my highest priority. And in terms of challenges, some of these were deep platform surgeries. Unistore, as you folks know, is an incredibly ambitious project that has never been done before. But it will roll out.
pairs.zh:
快速推出它们并推动采用显然是我的最高优先事项。在挑战方面，其中一些是深度的平台手术。如诸位所知，Unistore是一项前所未有、极具雄心的项目。但它终将落地。

Getting them out quickly and driving adoption is easily my highest priority. And in terms of challenges, some of these were deep platform surgeries. Unistore, as you folks know, is an incredibly ambitious project that has never been done before. But it will roll out.

pairs.en: So, I think you're going to see us realize a lot of benefits of the investments that we've been making in the core technology platform over the last two years. But as you know, AI is also moving at lightning speed. We have an amazing team that's at work on it. But I think there's just lots more disruption to the software landscape to come.
pairs.zh:
所以，我认为你会看到我们在过去两年中对核心技术平台的投资带来诸多收益。但如你所知，人工智能也在以闪电般的速度发展。我们有一支出色的团队正在为此努力。但我认为软件领域未来还将迎来更多颠覆。

原文：
So, I think you're going to see us realize a lot of benefits of the investments that we've been making in the core technology platform over the last two years. But as you know, AI is also moving at lightning speed. We have an amazing team that's at work on it. But I think there's just lots more disruption to the software landscape to come.

pairs.en: And that's why acting with speed and urgency is especially important for us.
pairs.zh:
这就是为什么以速度和紧迫感行事对我们尤其重要。

And that's why acting with speed and urgency is especially important for us.

pairs.en: All right. Thank you for taking my question. Under Frank's leadership, Snowflake has undoubtedly been a bit of a rocket ship. So Frank, I want to ask you, why leave now? And then, Sridhar, I can ask you as well.
pairs.zh:
好的。感谢你接受我的提问。在Frank的领导下，Snowflake无疑像一艘火箭船般飞速发展。那么Frank，我想问你，为什么要现在离开？然后，Sridhar，我也可以问你同样的问题。

All right. Thank you for taking my question. Under Frank's leadership, Snowflake has undoubtedly been a bit of a rocket ship. So Frank, I want to ask you, why leave now? And then, Sridhar, I can ask you as well.

pairs.en: Looking forward to you being in charge of exiting next steps, how are you thinking about your strategy for Snowflake and changes you want to make now that you're in the CEO position? I've got a quick follow-up, if that's all right.
pairs.zh:
期待您负责退出接下来的步骤，对于Snowflake的战略以及您担任CEO后想要做出的改变，您有何考虑？我还有一个简短的问题，如果方便的话。

Looking forward to you being in charge of exiting next steps, how are you thinking about your strategy for Snowflake and changes you want to make now that you're in the CEO position? I've got a quick follow-up, if that's all right.

pairs.en: Frank Slootman--Chairman
pairs.zh:
Frank Slootman--董事长

Frank Slootman--Chairman

pairs.en: Yeah. The important thing that I tried to highlight in the prepared remarks was that we haven't run succession as a time-based process. And I say, "Why ask now?" It's not a timing issue. It is, "Do we have the person that we think is going to be an incredible win for the company going forward?" You can't dictate that or mandate that.
pairs.zh:
是的。我在事先准备的发言中试图强调的一点是，我们并没有把继任计划视为一个基于时间的过程。我的问题是：“为什么现在问？”这不是时机问题，而是“我们是否找到了那个我们认为将在未来为公司带来巨大胜利的人？”这种事情是无法强行规定或命令的。

原文：
Yeah. The important thing that I tried to highlight in the prepared remarks was that we haven't run succession as a time-based process. And I say, "Why ask now?" It's not a timing issue. It is, "Do we have the person that we think is going to be an incredible win for the company going forward?" You can't dictate that or mandate that.

pairs.en: That is just based on opportunities that will or will not present themselves. So, we feel incredibly fortunate that we cross path with Sridhar through acquisition of Neeva. If I think of myself not just as the former CEO of Snowflake, but also as an individual shareholder in Snowflake, this is the move I want to make at this time. And I cannot tell you as an investor, how strong we used to feel about succession.
pairs.zh:
这完全取决于未来可能出现或不会出现的机会。因此，我们感到极其幸运，能够通过收购Neeva与Sridhar相遇。如果我不只把自己看作Snowflake的前CEO，同时也看作Snowflake的个人股东，那么这正是我在当下想要采取的行动。作为投资者，我无法向你形容我们过去对继任问题有多么强烈的感受。

That is just based on opportunities that will or will not present themselves. So, we feel incredibly fortunate that we cross path with Sridhar through acquisition of Neeva. If I think of myself not just as the former CEO of Snowflake, but also as an individual shareholder in Snowflake, this is the move I want to make at this time. And I cannot tell you as an investor, how strong we used to feel about succession.

pairs.en: This is not just about changing the guard. This is also about positioning the company really, really well for the challenges that are coming at us.
pairs.zh:
这不仅仅是关于换岗。这也是为了让公司在面对即将到来的挑战时，能够做好非常充分的定位。

This is not just about changing the guard. This is also about positioning the company really, really well for the challenges that are coming at us.

pairs.en: Sridhar Ramaswamy--Chief Executive Officer
pairs.zh:
Sridhar Ramaswamy——首席执行官

Sridhar Ramaswamy--Chief Executive Officer

pairs.en: Yeah. And just adding on to what Frank said just now, our short-term goals are very clear. As I said, we have a slew of product enhancements and everything from like transactional systems like Unistore, to interoperable storage, to making applications on top of our data cloud possible with native applications and container services and, of course, AI on top of that. So, I think the short term and the need to react pretty quickly to a very quick silver AI landscape is what I'm going to be focused on.
pairs.zh:
是的。接着Frank刚才说的，我们的短期目标非常明确。正如我所说，我们有一系列产品改进，从Unistore这样的交易系统，到可互操作存储，再到通过原生应用和容器服务在数据云上构建应用，当然还包括基于此的AI。所以，我认为短期目标的重点在于快速应对日新月异的AI领域变化。

Yeah. And just adding on to what Frank said just now, our short-term goals are very clear. As I said, we have a slew of product enhancements and everything from like transactional systems like Unistore, to interoperable storage, to making applications on top of our data cloud possible with native applications and container services and, of course, AI on top of that. So, I think the short term and the need to react pretty quickly to a very quick silver AI landscape is what I'm going to be focused on.

pairs.en: But I would almost say that, that actually translates pretty well into a longer-term strategy. Our belief is that a cloud that starts with data at the center combined with our product philosophy of creating a tightly integrated, easy-to-use product is the long-term winning strategy. Yes, there are going to be details that are different about which are the applications that we are going to be developing, what are ones that we are going to be doing in partnership, but that combination of the data cloud applications built on top of it with AI as an orchestrator is actually a pretty solid long-term strategy as well. Of course, as I said, we have to be adaptive because the world of AI and its capabilities are changing by the month.
pairs.zh:
但我几乎可以说，这实际上很好地转化为一项长期战略。我们相信，以数据为核心的云，结合我们打造紧密集成、易于使用产品的产品理念，是长期致胜策略。当然，具体在开发哪些应用、与哪些合作伙伴共同推进哪些项目，细节会有所不同，但以数据云应用为基础、AI作为编排器的组合，同样是一个相当稳健的长期战略。当然，如我所说，我们必须保持适应性，因为AI世界及其能力每月都在变化。

原文：
But I would almost say that, that actually translates pretty well into a longer-term strategy. Our belief is that a cloud that starts with data at the center combined with our product philosophy of creating a tightly integrated, easy-to-use product is the long-term winning strategy. Yes, there are going to be details that are different about which are the applications that we are going to be developing, what are ones that we are going to be doing in partnership, but that combination of the data cloud applications built on top of it with AI as an orchestrator is actually a pretty solid long-term strategy as well. Of course, as I said, we have to be adaptive because the world of AI and its capabilities are changing by the month.

pairs.en: And so, we have to be receptive to that kind of change. But I feel very good about the path that we have set out for ourselves in how effective it's going to be both in the short term and the long term.
pairs.zh:
因此，我们必须对这种变化持开放态度。但我对自己设定的路径感到非常满意，无论是短期还是长期，它都将非常有效。

And so, we have to be receptive to that kind of change. But I feel very good about the path that we have set out for ourselves in how effective it's going to be both in the short term and the long term.

pairs.en: For fiscal year '25, I think you assumed a number of large customers going to adopt Iceberg Table. So, some expectations on data moving out of Snowflake losing some storage revenue and some compute revenue there. Can you just double-click on why some of the existing large customers are going to choose Iceberg Table rather than their original?
pairs.zh:
对于财政年度'25，我认为你假设了一些大客户将采用Iceberg Table。因此，预期数据会移出Snowflake，导致损失一部分存储收入和计算收入。你能详细说明一下，为什么一些现有的大客户会选择Iceberg Table而不是他们原有的方案吗？

原文：For fiscal year '25, I think you assumed a number of large customers going to adopt Iceberg Table. So, some expectations on data moving out of Snowflake losing some storage revenue and some compute revenue there. Can you just double-click on why some of the existing large customers are going to choose Iceberg Table rather than their original?

pairs.en: Mike Scarpelli--Chief Financial Officer
pairs.zh:
Mike Scarpelli——首席财务官  
Mike Scarpelli--Chief Financial Officer

pairs.en: A lot of big customers want to have open file formats, to give them options. And by the way, this is not necessarily customers moving all of their storage out of Snowflake, but a lot of the growth in their storage will be put into Iceberg Tables is what we think is going to happen. So, you're just not going to see the growth associated with the storage in many of those customers. As a reminder, about 10% to 11% of our overall revenue is associated with storage.
pairs.zh:
许多大客户希望拥有开放文件格式，以便为他们提供更多选择。顺便提一下，这并不意味着客户会将所有存储从Snowflake迁移出去，但我们认为，他们未来存储增长的大部分将放在Iceberg Tables中。因此，你将在许多客户身上看不到与存储相关的增长。提醒一下，我们总营收中约有10%到11%与存储相关。

原文：
A lot of big customers want to have open file formats, to give them options. And by the way, this is not necessarily customers moving all of their storage out of Snowflake, but a lot of the growth in their storage will be put into Iceberg Tables is what we think is going to happen. So, you're just not going to see the growth associated with the storage in many of those customers. As a reminder, about 10% to 11% of our overall revenue is associated with storage.

pairs.en: Great. Thanks for taking my questions, guys. I guess following up on the Snowpark conversation, it feels like $35 million going to $100 million is, like you said, Mike, that is good growth. Could you talk a little bit more about sort of what the customer feedback has been? It feels like pipeline, it's like in every check you do, Snowpark is in the conversation.
pairs.zh:
好的，谢谢你们回答我的问题。接着刚才关于Snowpark的讨论，从3500万美元增长到1亿美元，就像你所说的，Mike，这确实是个不错的增长。你能再多谈谈客户的反馈吗？感觉在每次交流中，Snowpark都是话题焦点。

Great. Thanks for taking my questions, guys. I guess following up on the Snowpark conversation, it feels like $35 million going to $100 million is, like you said, Mike, that is good growth. Could you talk a little bit more about sort of what the customer feedback has been? It feels like pipeline, it's like in every check you do, Snowpark is in the conversation.

pairs.en: Yeah, hi. Christian here. The feedback has been very strongly positive. What we hear more often is better economics and better performance, but probably more important, more simplicity into how data doesn't have to be moved between systems and it's just an integrated solution.
pairs.zh:
嗯，你好。我是Christian。反馈非常积极。我们更常听到的是更好的经济效益和更好的性能，但可能更重要的是，数据无需在系统之间移动，一切更加简单，只是一个集成解决方案。

原文：
Yeah, hi. Christian here. The feedback has been very strongly positive. What we hear more often is better economics and better performance, but probably more important, more simplicity into how data doesn't have to be moved between systems and it's just an integrated solution.

pairs.en: Some of the enhancements that you see apply not only to data engineering, but also to traditional machine learning, which we see an increasing number of use cases also being deployed. So, the sentiment is very positive.
pairs.zh:
你所看到的一些增强功能不仅适用于数据工程，也适用于传统的机器学习，我们看到越来越多的用例也在部署中。因此，整体情绪非常积极。

Some of the enhancements that you see apply not only to data engineering, but also to traditional machine learning, which we see an increasing number of use cases also being deployed. So, the sentiment is very positive.

Tyler Radke--Citi -- Analyst

pairs.en: Yeah, thanks for taking the question. And I want to direct this question at Sridhar, maybe Christian can jump in. But just as we think about the product roadmap for FY '25, you talked a little about Unistore, Container Services, Cortex. Can you just put an update on when you expect these products to go GA? What you're seeing in terms of customer momentum? Any customer statistics you can call out? And then, how do you just kind of think about the maturity of these products, Sridhar, now that you've had time to look at the progress of these? Are you still expecting these to be contributors by year-end? Thank you.
pairs.zh:
好的，谢谢您的问题。我想把这个问题提给Sridhar，或许Christian也可以补充。关于2025财年的产品路线图，您提到了Unistore、Container Services和Cortex。能否更新一下这些产品预计何时正式发布？客户采用情况如何？有没有可以具体说明的客户数据？另外，Sridhar，您已经花了时间评估这些产品的进展，那么如何看待它们的成熟度？您是否仍然预期它们在年底前能有所贡献？谢谢。

Yeah, thanks for taking the question. And I want to direct this question at Sridhar, maybe Christian can jump in. But just as we think about the product roadmap for FY '25, you talked a little about Unistore, Container Services, Cortex. Can you just put an update on when you expect these products to go GA? What you're seeing in terms of customer momentum? Any customer statistics you can call out? And then, how do you just kind of think about the maturity of these products, Sridhar, now that you've had time to look at the progress of these? Are you still expecting these to be contributors by year-end? Thank you.

pairs.en: Sridhar Ramaswamy--Chief Executive Officer
pairs.zh:
Sridhar Ramaswamy——首席执行官

Sridhar Ramaswamy--Chief Executive Officer

pairs.en: I'll give a brief initial answer and then have Christian take over from there. One of the things that the Snowflake team is very, very good at doing is making sure that everything that we ship is tightly integrated with everything else. There's just fluid interoperability between our various features, and that is also rock solid. I think that culture of integrated and well-built features is a hallmark of Snowflake.
pairs.zh:
我先简单回答一下，然后由Christian接手。Snowflake团队非常擅长的其中一点，就是确保我们交付的所有功能都能与其他功能紧密集成。我们各项特性之间有着流畅的互操作性，而且这一点非常稳固。我认为这种集成且构建精良的Feature文化是Snowflake的标志。

原文：
I'll give a brief initial answer and then have Christian take over from there. One of the things that the Snowflake team is very, very good at doing is making sure that everything that we ship is tightly integrated with everything else. There's just fluid interoperability between our various features, and that is also rock solid. I think that culture of integrated and well-built features is a hallmark of Snowflake.

pairs.en: Of course, in areas like AI, which is moving at lightning speed, we want a stable infrastructure, but we also need to be flexible enough, whether it's new models that we put inside Cortex or other functionality that we need to develop on top of it. But a lot of the core investments that the team has made to allow for this kind of extensibility is what is coming in handy for us in terms of being able to ship things with speed. I'll hand it off to Christian to talk about when he expects different things to hit GA. Christian?
pairs.zh:
当然，在像AI这样飞速发展的领域，我们需要一个稳定的基础设施，但同时也要足够灵活——无论是我们在Cortex内部集成的新模型，还是需要在其上开发的其他功能。不过，团队为了支持这种可扩展性所投入的许多核心投资，才让我们能够快速交付产品。下面交给Christian，由他来谈谈各项功能预计何时达到GA状态。Christian？

Of course, in areas like AI, which is moving at lightning speed, we want a stable infrastructure, but we also need to be flexible enough, whether it's new models that we put inside Cortex or other functionality that we need to develop on top of it. But a lot of the core investments that the team has made to allow for this kind of extensibility is what is coming in handy for us in terms of being able to ship things with speed. I'll hand it off to Christian to talk about when he expects different things to hit GA. Christian?

pairs.en: Christian Kleinerman--Executive Vice President, Product
pairs.zh:
Christian Kleinerman--产品执行副总裁  

Christian Kleinerman--Executive Vice President, Product

pairs.en: Yeah. So, as both Sridhar and Mike mentioned, we expect a number of meaningful GA milestones this fiscal year, starting with generative AI, Cortex will be in public preview very soon, and we expect it to be generally available on and around the Summit's time frame. And as Sridhar said, we expect all sorts of interesting use cases of generative AI coming to the data and preserving privacy and security. Snowpark Container Services is already in public preview in AWS, and we expect it to be generally available in that same time frame, give or take a couple of months from Summit.
pairs.zh:
是的。所以，正如Sridhar和Mike都提到的，我们预计本财年将实现多项重要的GA里程碑，首先是生成式AI，Cortex很快就将进入公开预览阶段，我们预计它将在Summit活动前后正式可用。正如Sridhar所说，我们预计生成式AI将带来各种有趣的用例，这些用例将应用于数据领域，同时保护隐私和安全。Snowpark Container Services已经在AWS上处于公开预览阶段，我们预计它将在相同的时间框架内正式可用，大约在Summit活动前后相差几个月。

原文：Yeah. So, as both Sridhar and Mike mentioned, we expect a number of meaningful GA milestones this fiscal year, starting with generative AI, Cortex will be in public preview very soon, and we expect it to be generally available on and around the Summit's time frame. And as Sridhar said, we expect all sorts of interesting use cases of generative AI coming to the data and preserving privacy and security. Snowpark Container Services is already in public preview in AWS, and we expect it to be generally available in that same time frame, give or take a couple of months from Summit.

pairs.en: And is the ultimate extensibility capability for bringing computation into Snowflake. Iceberg Tables is already on public preview across all three clouds, and will be generally available again, also in the Data Cloud Summit time frame. Unistore, which enables combining transactional and analytical capabilities in single applications went very recently into public preview in AWS and will be generally available in the second half of the year. And Native Apps, which is how we accelerate time to value for both partners and customers is clearly GA on AWS and Azure, and we're continuing to round up the enhancement.
pairs.zh:
这是将计算引入Snowflake的终极可扩展能力。Iceberg Tables已在所有三大云平台上公开预览，并将在数据云峰会期间再次全面上市。Unistore可在单一应用中整合事务与分析能力，近期已在AWS上进入公开预览，并将在今年下半年全面上市。而Native Apps可加速合作伙伴与客户实现价值，已在AWS和Azure上全面上市，我们正持续完善其功能。

原文：
And is the ultimate extensibility capability for bringing computation into Snowflake. Iceberg Tables is already on public preview across all three clouds, and will be generally available again, also in the Data Cloud Summit time frame. Unistore, which enables combining transactional and analytical capabilities in single applications went very recently into public preview in AWS and will be generally available in the second half of the year. And Native Apps, which is how we accelerate time to value for both partners and customers is clearly GA on AWS and Azure, and we're continuing to round up the enhancement.

pairs.en: So, this is imminent, and we expect a strong showing of product capabilities at the Data Cloud Summit.
pairs.zh:
所以，这即将发生，我们期待在Data Cloud Summit上看到产品能力的强劲展示。

So, this is imminent, and we expect a strong showing of product capabilities at the Data Cloud Summit.

pairs.en: Hey, thanks for getting me on here, guys. And I did just want to follow up. I guess one of the dominant messages from management, if I just go back a quarter ago, really seem to be the theme about the growing use of unstructured data by your customers. And I don't know if it's just my read here, but it feels like it's a more muted message today.

Christian Kleinerman--产品执行副总裁

pairs.en: Christian here. The momentum that we shared in the last quarter has carried forward on to this quarter. So, there is no change in pace or interest. And if anything, the Document AI that Sridhar mentioned earlier in the call, where we have hundreds of customers lined up to be able to leverage this technology is all about extracting value and signal from unstructured documents.
pairs.zh:
Christian在这里。我们上个季度的势头延续到了本季度。所以，节奏或兴趣没有变化。而且，要说有什么不同的话，之前Sridhar在电话会议中提到的Document AI——我们有数百名客户排队等候利用这项技术——其全部意义在于从非结构化文档中提取价值和信号。

原文：
Christian here. The momentum that we shared in the last quarter has carried forward on to this quarter. So, there is no change in pace or interest. And if anything, the Document AI that Sridhar mentioned earlier in the call, where we have hundreds of customers lined up to be able to leverage this technology is all about extracting value and signal from unstructured documents.

pairs.en: So, the fact that it was not mentioned is not anything that should be read into. It is still a topic of high interest among many of our customers.
pairs.zh:
所以，它没有被提及这一事实并不应该被过度解读。它仍然是许多客户高度关注的话题。

So, the fact that it was not mentioned is not anything that should be read into. It is still a topic of high interest among many of our customers.

pairs.en: Mike Cikos--Needham and Company -- Analyst
pairs.zh:
Mike Cikos--Needham and Company--分析师

Mike Cikos--Needham and Company -- Analyst

pairs.en: Got it. And I know that you guys have these assumptions as well in the guidance around the potential headwinds from some of your larger customers adopting or moving data to Iceberg. Maybe to parse through that a little bit, can you talk about what you've seen thus far as far as customers' behavior? Are they already doing this with Iceberg? Or is it just an assumption that you guys have? I'm trying to get a sense as far as the behavior customers have exhibited, as well as how much you guys are peppering into your guidance today when we think about that headwind, as well as the rollout of tiered storage?
pairs.zh:
明白。而且我知道你们在指导中也有这些假设，关于一些大客户采用或迁移数据到Iceberg可能带来的潜在逆风。也许可以稍微剖析一下，你能谈谈到目前为止你看到的客户行为吗？他们已经在使用Iceberg做这件事了吗？还是这只是你们的假设？我想了解客户表现出的行为，以及在我们考虑这一逆风和分层存储的推出时，你们在今天的指导中加入了多大程度的考量？

Got it. And I know that you guys have these assumptions as well in the guidance around the potential headwinds from some of your larger customers adopting or moving data to Iceberg. Maybe to parse through that a little bit, can you talk about what you've seen thus far as far as customers' behavior? Are they already doing this with Iceberg? Or is it just an assumption that you guys have? I'm trying to get a sense as far as the behavior customers have exhibited, as well as how much you guys are peppering into your guidance today when we think about that headwind, as well as the rollout of tiered storage?

pairs.en: Mike Scarpelli--Chief Financial Officer
pairs.zh:
Mike Scarpelli——首席财务官  
Mike Scarpelli--Chief Financial Officer

pairs.en: Yeah. Iceberg is not GA yet. So, customers are not going to roll that into production until it's GA, and we do think it will be a gradual process of if they're going to move data out. But as soon as it's GA, new data can go into Iceberg Table.
pairs.zh:
是的。Iceberg尚未正式发布（GA）。因此，客户在它正式发布之前不会将其投入生产，而且我们确实认为，如果他们要将数据迁移出去，这将是一个渐进的过程。但一旦正式发布，新数据就可以进入Iceberg Table。

Yeah. Iceberg is not GA yet. So, customers are not going to roll that into production until it's GA, and we do think it will be a gradual process of if they're going to move data out. But as soon as it's GA, new data can go into Iceberg Table.

pairs.en: And we don't expect that to be GA until sometime around June time frame.
pairs.zh:
我们不预期那会成为GA，直到大约六月份左右。
And we don't expect that to be GA until sometime around June time frame.

pairs.en: Mike Cikos--Needham and Company -- Analyst
pairs.zh:
Mike Cikos--Needham and Company--分析师

Mike Cikos--Needham and Company -- Analyst

pairs.en: OK. And so, just to put a finer point on that though, the headwind we're expecting from Iceberg, this is theoretical, you have not seen that behavior from customers just yet?
pairs.zh:
好的。那么，说得更精确一点，我们预期来自Iceberg的逆风，这只是理论上的，你们还没有看到客户表现出那种行为吧？

OK. And so, just to put a finer point on that though, the headwind we're expecting from Iceberg, this is theoretical, you have not seen that behavior from customers just yet?

pairs.en: Mike Scarpelli--Chief Financial Officer
pairs.zh:
Mike Scarpelli——首席财务官  
Mike Scarpelli--Chief Financial Officer

pairs.en: Correct. It is what we are expecting. I know the tiered storage pricing that we rolled out we're seeing that today. And I'll let Christian add some to that as well, too.
pairs.zh:
正确。这正是我们所预期的。我知道我们推出的分层存储定价已经在今天看到效果了。下面让Christian再补充一些内容。

Correct. It is what we are expecting. I know the tiered storage pricing that we rolled out we're seeing that today. And I'll let Christian add some to that as well, too.

pairs.en: Christian Kleinerman--Executive Vice President, Product
pairs.zh:
Christian Kleinerman--产品执行副总裁  

Christian Kleinerman--Executive Vice President, Product

pairs.en: Yeah. I would add that for many of our large customers, we have been in touch on their plans for adoption of Iceberg. So, some of what see in our guidance has factored in those intentions.
pairs.zh:
是的。我想补充的是，对于我们的许多大客户，我们已就其采用Iceberg的计划进行了沟通。因此，我们在指引中看到的部分内容已经考虑了这些意图。

原文：Yeah. I would add that for many of our large customers, we have been in touch on their plans for adoption of Iceberg. So, some of what see in our guidance has factored in those intentions.

pairs.en: Mike Cikos--Needham and Company -- Analyst
pairs.zh:
Mike Cikos--Needham and Company--分析师

Mike Cikos--Needham and Company -- Analyst

pairs.en: Terrific. Thank you.
pairs.zh:
太好了。谢谢你。

Terrific. Thank you.

pairs.en: Operator
pairs.zh:
操作员
Operator

pairs.en: Thank you. Our next question comes from Michael Turrin of Wells Fargo. Your line is now open. Please go ahead.
pairs.zh:
谢谢。我们的下一位提问者来自Wells Fargo的Michael Turrin。您的线路已开通。请继续。

Thank you. Our next question comes from Michael Turrin of Wells Fargo. Your line is now open. Please go ahead.

pairs.en: Michael Turrin--Wells Fargo Securities -- Analyst
pairs.zh:
Michael Turrin——富国银行证券——分析师

Michael Turrin--Wells Fargo Securities -- Analyst

pairs.en: Hey, thanks. I appreciate you taking the question. Maybe one on hiring. I think you mentioned 1,000 net new heads you're expecting to add in the coming year.
pairs.zh:
嘿，谢谢。感谢你回答这个问题。也许问一个关于招聘的问题。我记得你提到过未来一年预计净新增1,000个岗位。

原文：Hey, thanks. I appreciate you taking the question. Maybe one on hiring. I think you mentioned 1,000 net new heads you're expecting to add in the coming year.

pairs.en: How are you balancing, adding to R&D given all the new product efforts and AI interest with bringing on sales capacity if the market does start to turn? And on the FedRAMP High authorization, any commentary around that, what that could open up and if that's an area of potential investment as well? Thank you.
pairs.zh:
鉴于所有新产品开发和对AI的兴趣，如果市场确实开始转向，您如何在增加研发投入与扩充销售能力之间取得平衡？关于FedRAMP High授权，有什么相关评论？它能打开哪些机会？以及这是否也是一个潜在的投资领域？谢谢。

How are you balancing, adding to R&D given all the new product efforts and AI interest with bringing on sales capacity if the market does start to turn? And on the FedRAMP High authorization, any commentary around that, what that could open up and if that's an area of potential investment as well? Thank you.

pairs.en: Mike Scarpelli--Chief Financial Officer
pairs.zh:
Mike Scarpelli——首席财务官  
Mike Scarpelli--Chief Financial Officer

pairs.en: I would say a lot of our expensive hiring is in the R&D area and it will continue to be more in the AI/ML space. These engineers are very expensive. With that said, we're still adding in the sales organization. And if we see an uptick in new customers and consumption patterns with our customers, we can easily dial that up just like we've dialed back our hiring in the past.
pairs.zh:
我认为我们在研发领域的高成本招聘很多，而且未来会更加集中在AI/ML领域。这些工程师非常昂贵。话虽如此，我们仍在销售部门增加人手。如果我们看到新客户及客户消费模式出现增长，我们可以轻松地增加招聘，就像过去我们减少招聘一样。

I would say a lot of our expensive hiring is in the R&D area and it will continue to be more in the AI/ML space. These engineers are very expensive. With that said, we're still adding in the sales organization. And if we see an uptick in new customers and consumption patterns with our customers, we can easily dial that up just like we've dialed back our hiring in the past.

pairs.en: But we are not going to sacrifice on R&D.
pairs.zh:
但我们不会在研发上做出牺牲。
But we are not going to sacrifice on R&D.

pairs.en: Michael Turrin--Wells Fargo Securities -- Analyst
pairs.zh:
Michael Turrin——富国银行证券——分析师

Michael Turrin--Wells Fargo Securities -- Analyst

pairs.en: Got it. Thanks.
pairs.zh:
明白了。谢谢。

Got it. Thanks.

pairs.en: Operator
pairs.zh:
操作员
Operator

pairs.en: Thank you. Our next question comes from Derrick Wood of TD Cowen. Your line is now open. Please go ahead.
pairs.zh:
谢谢。我们的下一个问题来自TD Cowen的Derrick Wood。您的线路已接通，请继续。

Thank you. Our next question comes from Derrick Wood of TD Cowen. Your line is now open. Please go ahead.

pairs.en: Derrick Wood--TD Cowen -- Analyst
pairs.zh:
Derrick Wood--TD Cowen -- 分析师
Derrick Wood--TD Cowen -- Analyst

pairs.en: Thanks. Mike, most other cloud consumption vendors are talking about stabilizing growth. You guys are still modeling pretty sharp deceleration over the next year. So, this certainly sticks out and may bring about questions on maybe company-specific challenges.
pairs.zh:
谢谢。Mike，大多数其他云消费供应商都在谈论稳定增长。而你们仍在预测明年将出现相当剧烈的减速。所以这显然很突出，可能会引发关于公司特有挑战的疑问。

Thanks. Mike, most other cloud consumption vendors are talking about stabilizing growth. You guys are still modeling pretty sharp deceleration over the next year. So, this certainly sticks out and may bring about questions on maybe company-specific challenges.

pairs.en: So first, are there any notable customer or workload losses that could be weighing on growth this year? And generally, how are you feeling about sales productivity and competitive win rates in the current environment?
pairs.zh:
那么首先，今年是否有显著的客户或工作负载流失可能会拖累增长？总体而言，在当前环境下，您如何看待销售生产力以及竞争胜率？

原文：
So first, are there any notable customer or workload losses that could be weighing on growth this year? And generally, how are you feeling about sales productivity and competitive win rates in the current environment?

pairs.en: Mike Scarpelli--Chief Financial Officer
pairs.zh:
Mike Scarpelli——首席财务官  
Mike Scarpelli--Chief Financial Officer

pairs.en: Absolutely no big competitive losses or workloads moving off that I'm aware of. This is all related to our model where a lot of the performance improvements that we have in our software go directly to the customer. And that's why I was pointing out you saw there was a 62% year-over-year growth in jobs on a daily basis run on Snowflake versus only a 33% revenue growth. And we know there's a lot of performance improvements coming into play this year, coupled with Iceberg, coupled with tiered storage pricing that we rolled out.
pairs.zh:
据我所知，完全没有出现重大的竞争失利或工作负载迁移的情况。这一切都归因于我们的模式——软件中的许多性能改进直接让客户受益。这就是为什么我指出，你们看到Snowflake上每日运行的作业量同比增长了62%，而收入仅增长了33%。而且我们知道，今年将有许多性能改进投入使用，再加上Iceberg，以及我们推出的分层存储定价（tiered storage pricing）。

原文：
Absolutely no big competitive losses or workloads moving off that I'm aware of. This is all related to our model where a lot of the performance improvements that we have in our software go directly to the customer. And that's why I was pointing out you saw there was a 62% year-over-year growth in jobs on a daily basis run on Snowflake versus only a 33% revenue growth. And we know there's a lot of performance improvements coming into play this year, coupled with Iceberg, coupled with tiered storage pricing that we rolled out.

pairs.en: And I was able to roll out the tiered storage pricing because we were getting much better pricing from the cloud vendors to us.
pairs.zh:
我能够推出分层存储定价，因为云供应商给我们提供了更优惠的价格。

And I was able to roll out the tiered storage pricing because we were getting much better pricing from the cloud vendors to us.

pairs.en: Derrick Wood--TD Cowen -- Analyst
pairs.zh:
Derrick Wood--TD Cowen -- 分析师
Derrick Wood--TD Cowen -- Analyst

pairs.en: Yeah. OK. It would be interesting to kind of see what the growth rates on just the workloads related to compute is relative to the storage drag. Maybe that's something you could give.
pairs.zh:
是的。好的。如果能看看仅与计算相关的工作负载相对于存储拖累的增长率，那将很有意思。也许你可以提供这方面的数据。

Yeah. OK. It would be interesting to kind of see what the growth rates on just the workloads related to compute is relative to the storage drag. Maybe that's something you could give.

pairs.en: But just how do you feel about ultimately kind of getting back to 30% growth longer term? And kind of what's the top one or two critical things that need to take place to get you there?
pairs.zh:
但你对长期最终恢复到30%的增长感觉如何？以及需要发生的一两件最关键的事情是什么？

But just how do you feel about ultimately kind of getting back to 30% growth longer term? And kind of what's the top one or two critical things that need to take place to get you there?

pairs.en: Mike Scarpelli--Chief Financial Officer
pairs.zh:
Mike Scarpelli——首席财务官  
Mike Scarpelli--Chief Financial Officer

pairs.en: I would say the biggest thing is the uptick in consumption associated with all the new enhancements we have in our product, in particular, what we could see coming out of Cortex, we could see coming out of Snowpark Container Services, and ultimately, what we could see in Native App development on our platform.
pairs.zh:
我认为最重要的变化是，我们产品中所有新增强功能带来的消费增长，特别是我们在Cortex中看到的、在Snowpark Container Services中看到的，以及最终在我们的平台上进行Native App开发时看到的增长。

原文：
I would say the biggest thing is the uptick in consumption associated with all the new enhancements we have in our product, in particular, what we could see coming out of Cortex, we could see coming out of Snowpark Container Services, and ultimately, what we could see in Native App development on our platform.

pairs.en: Derrick Wood--TD Cowen -- Analyst
pairs.zh:
Derrick Wood--TD Cowen -- 分析师
Derrick Wood--TD Cowen -- Analyst

pairs.en: OK. Thank you.
pairs.zh:
好的。谢谢。

OK. Thank you.

pairs.zh:

Thank you. Our next question comes from Gray Powell of BTIG. Your line is now open. Please go ahead.

pairs.en: Gray Powell--BTIG -- Analyst
pairs.zh:
Gray Powell--BTIG -- 分析师

Gray Powell--BTIG -- Analyst

pairs.en: OK. Great. Thank you for taking the question. I just had a quick follow-up on Snowpark.
pairs.zh:
好的。很好。感谢您回答这个问题。我有个关于Snowpark的快速跟进问题。

OK. Great. Thank you for taking the question. I just had a quick follow-up on Snowpark.

pairs.en: I think you called out Snowpark at a $70 million annual run rate one day back in December. I know that was sort of like a one-day statistic. But I'm just trying to think through that. I mean, the guide of 3% of revenue for fiscal '25, that's like $95 million, $100 million.
pairs.zh:
我想你在十二月某天提到了Snowpark的年化收入达到7000万美元。我知道那只是一个单日的数据。但我在试图理清这个数字。我的意思是，2025财年收入指导中3%的比例，大概是9500万到1亿美元。

I think you called out Snowpark at a $70 million annual run rate one day back in December. I know that was sort of like a one-day statistic. But I'm just trying to think through that. I mean, the guide of 3% of revenue for fiscal '25, that's like $95 million, $100 million.

pairs.en: I guess it just seems kind of conservative given that consumption of Snowpark was growing 45% quarter over quarter last quarter. Just how should we think about the level of conservatism on that assumption within your guidance?
pairs.zh:
我觉得这似乎有点保守，毕竟上个季度Snowpark的消费量环比增长了45%。我们该如何看待你们指引中这一假设的保守程度呢？

I guess it just seems kind of conservative given that consumption of Snowpark was growing 45% quarter over quarter last quarter. Just how should we think about the level of conservatism on that assumption within your guidance?

pairs.en: Mike Scarpelli--Chief Financial Officer
pairs.zh:
Mike Scarpelli——首席财务官  
Mike Scarpelli--Chief Financial Officer

pairs.en: Well, what I'm saying is we're guiding it to be 3% of product revenue this year, and you can infer what you want from the guidance.
pairs.zh:
嗯，我的意思是，我们预计今年它将占产品收入的3%，你可以从这一指引中自行推断。

Well, what I'm saying is we're guiding it to be 3% of product revenue this year, and you can infer what you want from the guidance.

pairs.en: Gray Powell--BTIG -- Analyst
pairs.zh:
Gray Powell--BTIG -- 分析师

Gray Powell--BTIG -- Analyst

pairs.en: Well, all right then. Thank you very much.
pairs.zh:
好的，那就这样吧。非常感谢。

Well, all right then. Thank you very much.

pairs.zh:
操作员
Operator

pairs.en: Thank you. We will take no further questions for today. [Operator signoff]
pairs.zh:
谢谢。今天我们不再接受更多问题。[Operator signoff]

Thank you. We will take no further questions for today. [Operator signoff]
